identity.tagline: A community of faith, hope and love

nav.coursesBaptismDesc: Get ready to take the step

hero.title: A place where faith feels like home
hero.subtitle: We are an evangelical community walking together in hope, service and love. There's a place for you.

welcome.title: We're so glad you're here
welcome.body: At Nueva Vida we believe no one was made to walk alone. Whoever you are and wherever you come from, you'll find a family that welcomes you with open arms, a table with room for you and a message of hope that transforms. Come as you are.
welcome.verse: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.

about.title: About us
about.previewBody: Since 1998 we have walked alongside families in Seville on their journey of faith. We believe in a gospel that heals, a community that sustains and a service that transforms the neighbourhood.
about.valueFaithDesc: A living trust in God that sustains every day.
about.valueFamilyDesc: No one walks alone: we are community.
about.valueServiceDesc: We love our neighbourhood with deeds, not just words.
about.valueMissionDesc: We carry hope beyond our walls.
about.visionBody: To be a community that reflects the love of Christ in every corner of the city, where each person finds faith, purpose and family.
about.missionBody: To proclaim the gospel, form disciples and serve our city with compassion and excellence.
about.visitBody: We know that coming for the first time can feel daunting. Here's what you need to know to feel at home from the very first minute.
about.visitParkingDesc: Free next to the building, with accessible spaces.
about.visitKidsDesc: Children's room with helpers during the service.
about.visitDressDesc: Come as you are; what matters here is you.

ministries.title: Ministries and areas
ministries.subtitle: Grow, serve and connect according to your stage of life.
ministries.youthDesc: Gatherings, retreats and groups for a new generation.
ministries.couplesDesc: Support and courses to strengthen the home.
ministries.kidsDesc: A safe space where little ones discover God.
ministries.worshipDesc: We worship with all our heart and with excellence.
ministries.missionsDesc: We carry hope inside and beyond the city.
ministries.prayerDesc: We hold up the church on our knees.

media.title: Connect wherever you are
media.subtitle: Join us on radio and television every day.
media.offAir: There's no live broadcast right now. Enjoy our past services.
media.radioIntro: Music, preaching and programs to accompany your day.
media.tvIntro: Experience every service live and rewatch past ones anytime.
media.nowPlayingDesc: Tune in to our broadcast and let the Word keep you company.
media.subscribeDesc: Follow us on YouTube so you never miss a live broadcast.
media.loadPlayerHint: Tap to load the player. Nothing plays automatically.
media.metaRadioDesc: Listen to Nueva Vida Radio live: music, preaching and programs every day, with the full weekly schedule.
media.metaTvDesc: Watch Nueva Vida Television live and rewatch past services anytime, with the full weekly schedule.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Places designed for us to meet.
facilities.accessibilityBody: Ramp access, adapted restroom and hearing loop for hearing-aid users.
facilities.cafeNote: Prices include VAT. Proceeds support the church's social projects.
facilities.ctaTitle: Want to see our spaces in person?
facilities.ctaBody: Arrange a guided visit and we'll show you every corner of the church at your own pace.

camps.title: Camps
camps.subtitle: Days to disconnect and reconnect with God.
camps.teaser: This summer, live an experience you'll always remember.

courses.title: Courses and gatherings
courses.subtitle: Spaces to learn, connect and take steps of faith.
courses.hubSubtitle: Four pathways to grow in faith, strengthen your home and take firm steps together with the community.
courses.enrollIntro: Leave us your details and we will get in touch to walk this course with you.

courses.enrollSuccess: Enrollment received! We will get in touch with you soon.
